text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm out shopping with Sakura
Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oho? What's happening over there?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ooh, they're holding a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec! Trainer, didn't we get a raffle ticket
earlier when we bought that cleat polish?
choice_data_list: Do you want to give the raffle a try?
Do you want to give the raffle a try?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I do, but it'll be so disappointing if I get my hopes
up and then don't win anything...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So I'm thinking... how about we do it together?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If we make it a joint effort, I feel like it'll be
easier to accept the results even if they're bad,
you know? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accept Sakura Chiyono O's offer, and we turn
the lever together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, Trainer! We did it! We got th-th-the—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! The grand prize! We got the grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The grand prize, the grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O suddenly grabs my hands and
starts jumping up and down in sheer excitement.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Congrats to you too! Hehe! I can barely believe it!
We got the best prize of them all!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! You two are just like a cute pair of
siblings! I assume you'll be going on the trip
together, then?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! You two are just like a cute pair of
sisters! I assume you'll be going on the trip
together, then?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: This ticket isn't for just one person? I can go too?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Of course! The shopping district isn't so stingy as to only offer a hot spring vacation coupon for one!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow! That's so generous!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-in that case! Trainer, is it okay if I go with you
too?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I thought the coupon was just for one person, so I
was going to let you have it, but I'd love to go
together if that's all right...
choice_data_list: Sure! But are you sure you want to go with me?
Sure! But are you sure you want to go with me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! In fact, there's no one else I'd rather
go with!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
When do you think we should go? We're still so
busy right now, so...
choice_data_list:
Guess we'll have to wait until everything's
settled down.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! Hehe. Once we pick a date to go,
I'll make a full schedule for our trip!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been to a hot spring since I went with my
family as a kid! I hope they have karaoke
machines there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recognize the inn on the coupon. Apparently,
many Umamusume like to go there to refresh
themselves in their rejuvenating hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once everything's calmed down, it'll make a nice,
relaxing reward for all of Sakura Chiyono O's hard
work.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Whoa, it looks delicious! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Haha! No need for thanks. Your luck got you that
prize, not me.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I can tell you're a hard worker from a glance, and
you know what they say—good things come to
those who wait!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Th-thank you...
choice_data_list: He's right. You're a very diligent worker.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Not you too, Trainer! Don't go flattering me out
of nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I know I work hard, but I'm nothing special...
choice_data_list: You don't think so? I think you are.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Eep! Cut that out already...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: U-urgh...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're special too, just so you know!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I bet that's why we got the first prize together! It wasn't just my luck. It was our luck!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The combined luck of a special person like you
and a kinda-special someone like me is what won
us the prize!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So, um! Yeah. Thanks for contributing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O presses her hands to her
bright-red face and flees from the scene.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As an apology for embarrassing her, I let her have
the raffle prize all to herself.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I can't even see the bottom of the box, it's
so packed with carrots!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
We could eat nothing but carrots for two whole
days with this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Hehe. You can leave the cooking to me. I'm
a master at making the carrot chanko hot pot my
mom taught me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure you're fed noon, evening, and night
for a whole day! You won't have to lift a finger.
choice_data_list: Wait, separate meals for evening and night?!
Wait, separate meals for evening and night?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Oops, you're right. I'd just get in your way if
I stopped by so many times.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And it'd be rude of me to barge in on you in your
room late at night...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay, change of plans! I have an idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, later that evening...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Traaainer! Would you mind opening the door?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Phew! Here's your delivery of my special chanko!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Your evening and night portions are both in
there, so go ahead and dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She places the biggest pot I've ever seen in my
life on my desk. A peek inside reveals a steaming
hot pot brimming with carrots cut into beautiful
little roses...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I recognize this variety of carrot! Everyone
was losing their minds over it a while ago. It's a
Sweety-Sweet Carrot, right?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You've got quite an eye, miss!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, yeah! They had an entire special about it
on TV yesterday! Apparently, these carrots taste
like pure sugar on your tongue!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe.... Hmm... Sweety-Sweet... I can't wait to
taste it...
choice_data_list: You can have it, Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Can I?! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean... Urgh... Sorry for getting all worked up.
Is there a hole anywhere I can crawl into?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's cheeks redden by the second.
Despite her reward consisting of only one carrot,
she still graciously accepts it.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Aw, man. That was a total bust... I'm sorry,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But still...
choice_data_list:
Since it was a joint effort, we can accept any
result, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Oh, right. I did say that. I guess that
means we can split the disappointment between
us too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sharing the burden of disappointment, Sakura
Chiyono O and I quietly return to campus.
